_preset: solo — the delivery floor. Core rules only; team/critical rules SKIP as n/a. The pipeline must exist, be automated, and be alive, and a rollback path is documented — no required review, no staging tier, no IaC mandate. Copy to <repo>/pipeline.repo.json, then set type + default_branch to reality. Declare a higher tier only when you'll actually carry its process (DESC-03 checks the declaration against reality).
recovery_objective: Redeploy the previous release to restore service within 30 minutes of a bad deploy.
